offer: For property managers handling 5–15 properties, inaccurate pricing causes lost rental income. We provide real-time vacancy monitoring and pricing recommendations instead of manual market research and guesswork.
problem: Inability to adjust pricing based on real-time vacancy data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about pricing tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in property management forums
try_it: Let users try real-time vacancy tracking on 1-3 properties
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing property data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
